'''âsh-t-b-sh''' ('''kashatbeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pugne|pugne]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pugne|pugne]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-t-b-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kashatbeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishatbeshoko|thishatbeshoko]] || [[word:jishatbeshoko|jishatbeshoko]] || [[word:shishatbeshoko|shishatbeshoko]] || [[word:kishatbeshoko|kishatbeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshatbeshoko|thoshatbeshoko]] || [[word:joshatbeshoko|joshatbeshoko]] || [[word:shoshatbeshoko|shoshatbeshoko]] || [[word:koshatbeshoko|koshatbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshatbeshoko|thĂŠshatbeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshatbeshoko|jĂŠshatbeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshatbeshoko|shĂŠshatbeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshatbeshoko|kĂŠshatbeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
